name: tactical-grid-msgdat-boundaryfix
description: Fix RE-confirmed tactical/grid panel ConstMsg lookups that cross the group 0x16 boundary and render NO DATA.
verified: ENCODED 2026-06-21: FUN_00544b20 uses group 0x16 subIds 0x7c..0x80, but constmsg group 0x16 has only 123 entries. The original flat table indices map to group 0x17 sub 1..3 and group 0x18 sub 0..1. Same-length call-site immediate patches only; does not add speculative records.

patches.note: FUN_00544b20 first grid-list header: g0x16/s0x7c -> g0x17/s1 (flat constmsg 1400: 공간 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 type-1 inline label: g0x16/s0x7e -> g0x17/s3 (flat constmsg 1402: 성계 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 second grid-list header: g0x16/s0x7d -> g0x17/s2 (flat constmsg 1401: 항행 불능 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 first count prefix: g0x16/s0x80 -> g0x18/s1 (flat constmsg 1404: 공간 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 first count suffix: g0x16/s0x7f -> g0x18/s0 (flat constmsg 1403: 플라스마 폭풍 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 second count prefix: g0x16/s0x80 -> g0x18/s1 (flat constmsg 1404: 공간 그리드)
FUN_00544b20 second count suffix: g0x16/s0x7f -> g0x18/s0 (flat constmsg 1403: 플라스마 폭풍 그리드)
